code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut p = 0
mut n = 0
for tok in tokens
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    if v > 0
      p = p + v
    else if v < 0
      n = n + v
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

let r = p - n
println("r=#{r}")
